LUMENN_ROLL_RELAY.settings.title: Lumenn Roll Relay
LUMENN_ROLL_RELAY.settings.worldToken.hi: Token generated by the Lumenn Relay bot in Discord (/setup command).
LUMENN_ROLL_RELAY.settings.hideGMRolls.h: When enabled, GM rolls are not sent to Discord.
Rolls with a total result below this value are not sent (0 = no filter).
LUMENN_ROLL_RELAY.settings.onlyD20.name: Only d20 Rolls
LUMENN_ROLL_RELAY.settings.onlyD20.hint: When enabled, only rolls involving 1d20 are relayed (ignores damage, skills with other dice, etc).
LUMENN_ROLL_RELAY.settings.gmDisplayName: Custom name for the Game Master on the leaderboard (instead of the Discord/Foundry username).
LUMENN.PlayerConfigHint: Set your Discord ID and character image to appear on the leaderboard. This data is sent along with your rolls.
LUMENN.PlayerConfigDiscordIdHint: Your numeric Discord ID (17-20 digits). Enable Developer Mode in Discord to copy it.
LUMENN.PlayerConfigImageUrlHint: Direct link to a 9:16 image of your character (Imgur, Pinterest, etc). Shows on the leaderboard.
LUMENN.PlayerConfigCharacterNameHint: Your character's name (up to 80 characters). Shown on the leaderboard next to your Discord name.
LUMENN.PlayerConfigDisplayNameHint: This name is used on the leaderboard. Change it in Foundry user settings.
LUMENN.PlayerConfigInvalidDiscordId: Invalid Discord ID. Must be 17-20 numeric digits.
LUMENN.PlayerConfigInvalidImageUrl: Invalid image URL. Must start with http:// or https://
